title: crunchy clay cooked russian chickpeas tagine
description: a malty, fluffy, and nutritious russian dish made with chickpeas, bonito shavings, and served in a clay tajine vessel.

ingredients.name: chana dal
ingredients.notes: split red lentils are a good substitute if you can't find chana dal.

instructions: heat the olive oil in a clay tajine over medium-low heat.
add the chopped onion and saut8e until softened, about 5 minutes.
add the minced garlic and cook for another minute.
add the chickpeas, water, thyme, paprika, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 20 minutes.
stir in the bonito flakes and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
note: you can also make this recipe in a Dutch oven or saucepan, but a clay tajine is a more authentic and flavorful cooking vessel.
